description: Cross-session self-improvement loop: mines session transcripts for recurring friction and proposes CLAUDE.md rules, skill/plugin ideas, and failed-approach warnings — applied only on approval.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

dropped.reason: no Codex peer for this hook event
all hook events unsupported on Codex (SessionEnd)

interface.longDescription:
Cross-session self-improvement loop: a SessionEnd hook records per-session friction stats (turns, errors, best-effort friction events) to a project-local ledger; /hindsight:harvest ranks high-friction sessions, deep-mines transcripts via a transcript-miner agent with a ≥2-session recurrence gate, and proposes CLAUDE.md rules, skill/plugin ideas, and failed-approach warnings — applied only on explicit approval. Includes /hindsight:harvest and a transcript-miner agent.

Codex fidelity: 0 faithful, 3 degraded, 2 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Cross-session self-improvement loop: mines session transcripts for recurring friction and proposes CLAUDE.md rules, skill/plugin ideas, and failed-approach warnings — applied only on approval.

name: hindsight
